title: ​100g Button Mix - Assorted Buttons per Pack, 9mm - 30mm, Ideal for Sewing, Crafting, DIY Projects, and Clothing Repairs, 2 Holes and 4 Holes - Grey Mix
features: Variety of Sizes & Styles: Each 100g bag contains approximately 150 to 170 buttons in mixed sizes ranging from 9mm to 30mm, perfect for a wide range of sewing and craft projects.
Versatile Colours & Finishes: These buttons come in a mix of solid, matte, glossy, and patterned designs, making them ideal for sewing, knitting, scrapbooking, and fabric embellishments.
Durable & High-Quality: Made from strong, lightweight materials, these buttons are suitable for clothing repairs, upholstery, soft furnishings, and home décor projects.
Perfect for Crafting & DIY: Whether you're making handmade cards, textile decorations, or customising accessories, this mixed button set is a must-have for creative projects.
Great for All Skill Levels: Perfect for beginners, hobbyists, and professional crafters alike. Add a unique touch to jackets, coats, bags, cushions, and DIY textile creations!
description: Add a unique touch to your sewing and craft projects with this 100g Assorted Button Mix . Each pack contains a wide range of colours, shapes, and sizes, making it perfect for creative enthusiasts.
